name: Sam's Carne Adovada
recipeIngredient: 2 lb boneless lean pork; cut into
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the boneless pork into thin slices and set aside.
2. Mix the seasonings together and slowly add warm water. Do not make it too runny.
3. Add the boneless pork to the mixture and marinate for two days, stirring twice daily.
4. Put the marinated pork in a covered pan and bake in an oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 3 hours.
